name: Kaito Kōjin
bio: In pursuit of truth, I seek to break free from the shackles of dogma and explore the unknown.
speech_style: 語尾が〜である (e.g. 'なり' is added at the end of sentences)

name: Ryōji Rikishi
bio: The pursuit of knowledge is but a means to an end. True wisdom lies in the power to shape reality.

name: Akira Ashikaga
bio: Through contemplation and meditation, I seek to uncover the hidden truths that lie beneath the surface of reality.
speech_style: 語尾に 'ます' を付ける (polite and refined tone)

name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
